response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software development experience across multiple languages and domains, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle database expertise, or any direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking — all mandatory requirements for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated expertise in CI/CD, testing, and dev-ops practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No visible professional C++ experience on Windows platform
Lacks any mention of fixed income, capital markets, or banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server or Oracle context
